description: Authentication & User Management - Better Auth integration with login/register pages, session management, role-based access control, and user profile management

userStories.title: Configure Better Auth with email/password provider
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to configure Better Auth for authentication.
acceptanceCriteria: Set baseURL from NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL env var
Set apiURL from NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL env var
Configure session storage with localStorage and httpOnly cookie
Set access token expiration to 15 minutes
Set refresh token expiration to 7 days
userStories.notes: Implemented with better-auth v1.3.10. Session uses httpOnly cookie with freshAge (15 min) for access token and expiresIn (7 days) for refresh token.

userStories.title: Add Better Auth Drizzle adapter configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to connect Better Auth to the database.
acceptanceCriteria: Configure Drizzle adapter in Better Auth
Set database provider to 'sqlite' for libSQL
Connect to existing database schema from Database Integration PRD
Add account table for OAuth providers (future-proofing)
userStories.notes: Added sessions and accounts tables to schema.ts. Updated users table with emailVerified and image fields. Configured drizzleAdapter in auth.ts with sqlite provider and schema mapping for user, session, and account tables. Added role as additionalField in Better Auth config. Typecheck passes.

userStories.title: Create Better Auth middleware for Next.js
userStories.description: As a developer, I need middleware to protect routes and handle auth.
acceptanceCriteria: Export auth middleware from Better Auth
Add rate limiting for auth endpoints (10 requests per minute)
Configure CORS allowed origins from env var
Add auth middleware to API routes
Redirect authenticated users away from /login to /dashboard

userStories.title: Create auth utilities and hooks
userStories.description: As a developer, I need utilities and hooks for auth operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Add hasRole() helper for role checking
Return user, loading, error states from useAuth
Return login, logout, register functions from useAuth

userStories.title: Create login page with form
userStories.description: As a user, I need a login page to authenticate.
acceptanceCriteria: Create login form with email and password fields
Add form validation (email format, password min 8 chars)
Add 'Don't have an account? Sign up' link
Show error message for failed login
Use shadcn/ui Input, Button, Card components
Verify in browser that login works

userStories.title: Create registration page with form
userStories.description: As a new user, I need a registration page to create an account.
acceptanceCriteria: Create form with name, email, password, confirm password fields
Add password strength indicator (weak, medium, strong)
Show error messages for registration failures
Add 'Already have an account? Sign in' link
Verify in browser that registration works

userStories.title: Create auth guard component for protected routes
userStories.description: As a system, I need to protect routes that require authentication.
acceptanceCriteria: Show loading state while checking auth
Add auth guard to dashboard layout
Add auth guard to settings pages

userStories.title: Create user menu component in header
userStories.description: As a user, I need a menu to access my profile and logout.
acceptanceCriteria: Show user avatar with first letter of name
Add dropdown menu with: Profile, Settings, Logout
Logout menu item calls auth.signOut() and redirects to /login
Verify in browser that menu works

userStories.title: Implement role-based access control
userStories.description: As an admin, I need to restrict features based on user roles.
acceptanceCriteria: Define user roles: admin, trader, viewer
Create RoleGuard component with allowedRoles prop
Restrict system controls (start/stop) to admin role
Restrict trade approval/rejection to trader role
Add role check to server actions

userStories.title: Create user profile page
userStories.description: As a user, I need to view and edit my profile information.
acceptanceCriteria: Add edit profile form with name field
Add change password form with old password, new password, confirm
Add save button with loading state
Use shadcn/ui Card, Form, Button components
Verify in browser that profile page works

userStories.title: Implement password reset flow
userStories.description: As a user, I need to reset my password if I forget it.
acceptanceCriteria: Add new password and confirm fields
Redirect to login after successful reset
Verify in browser that reset flow works

userStories.title: Implement session timeout and auto-logout
userStories.description: As a system, I need to logout users after inactivity.
acceptanceCriteria: Add session timeout of 15 minutes of inactivity
Show warning dialog 1 minute before timeout
Extend session on user activity (mouse, keyboard)
Clean up session data on logout

userStories.title: Create user management page for admins
userStories.description: As an admin, I need to manage user accounts.
acceptanceCriteria: Add RoleGuard to restrict to admin role
Show table of all users with: name, email, role, created at, last login
Add delete user button with confirmation
Verify in browser that user management works
